category: tech labels: [bot] created_at: 2026-03-01T02:21:03.211Z machine_name: User-492 slug: an-you-create-a-twit

an you create a twitter bot in python with support for reading 4-5 configurable accounts using v2api it should see new updates from all these twitter accounts and then it should post choose one of the configuratble option or random tweet / give option to choose it and then write to my account .
